comments.author: What-Le-Phoque
comments.body: You guys have to learn about dependent probabilities. Calculate (100-Risk) to get your success probability. Then divide by 100 to get the factor. So in step 1 your success rate is 0.5, then 0.6 then 0.73…. Multiply it all and you get the probability of hitting 1.2 million. It’s around 1%!
